## Thank You {.center}

Questions?

<!-- Add a QR code or contact card: ![](../../images/qr-code.png) -->

::: {.smaller}
**Mitch Gerhardt**

<i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> [mitchg\@vt.edu](mailto:mitchg@vt.edu)

<i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> [github.com/mitcherg10](https://github.com/mitcherg10)

<i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i> [linkedin.com/in/mitchell-gerhardt](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mitchell-gerhardt)
:::
